data.body: Pass-4 coach (passes.pass4_coach + MOVE_REGISTRY): single-turn over surviving advisory findings, maps each to a move, renders prose DETERMINISTICALLY from the locked template; C1 subject validator. REMEDIATED: project-extensibility via orchestrator.load_move_registry (.rebar/plan_review_moves.json merge) + tests for pass4_coach itself (mapping/deterministic-render/drop) + the project-move merge. Coach is a library prompt.
